race.name: Gantrisch Loppet
race.tagline: A Swiss Loppet race in the pre-Alpine Gantrisch nature park — compact freestyle skiing south of Bern with views of the Bernese Alps.

climate.description: Gantrisch nature park at ~1,000m altitude. Snow reliability moderate; event has been cancelled in some years. Temperatures typically -5°C to 2°C.
challenges: Snow reliability is a concern — event cancelled in some years

course.primary: Loop course through the Gantrisch nature park south of Bern. Pre-Alpine terrain with forest and meadow sections.
features: Part of the Swiss Loppet series

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Pleasant Gantrisch Nature Park setting close to Bern, but snow reliability limits the event.

history.summary: The Gantrisch Loppet is a Swiss Loppet series race in the Gantrisch Nature Park south of Bern. The area offers pre-Alpine Nordic skiing relatively close to Switzerland's capital.
notable_facts: Set in Gantrisch Nature Park, a UNESCO Biosphere candidate
Part of the Swiss Loppet series
